falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish exhaustion, invalidating the 'hold' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 300% above the 20-day average on a single day within the window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly opposing the pattern's bottom formation characteristics.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score rises to 75 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 75 would confirm overbought conditions, refuting the pattern's implied oversold bottom scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
